creator: me@player701.net
text: I wish I could submit a new version myself, but I don't have a suitable environment for that nor the expertise necessary to set it up. I'm truly sorry if my original request was inappropriate. I only wanted to point out that the current version of this port lacks a crucial security-oriented feature, and it would be nice to have it updated, especially since that the global API keys are now considered "legacy" by Cloudflare and are not recommended to be used anymore.
